name: feedmail
description: RSS-to-email microservice on Cloudflare Workers. Monitor feeds, manage subscribers, send newsletters.

scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply feedmail --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute feedmail --local --command "DELETE FROM subscribers; DELETE FROM verification_attempts; DELETE FROM sent_items; DELETE FROM subscriber_sends; DELETE FROM rate_limits; DELETE FROM site_config; DELETE FROM rate_limit_config; DELETE FROM feeds; DELETE FROM channels;"
